summary: Tested Info Pages feature - all 5 info pages (delivery, returns, faq, privacy, terms) are accessible via API and render correctly in frontend. Backend auto-seeds default content when DB is empty. All slug aliases work correctly. Footer links in ShopLayout.js include all required pages.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds DEFAULT_INFO_PAGES when DB is empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: Info pages are at /shop/info/{slug} where slug can be: delivery, returns, faq, privacy, terms. Backend endpoint is GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/{slug}. Slug aliases are supported (e.g., delivery-information -> delivery, faqs -> faq). ShopLayout.js footer has Customer Service section with all 6 links. TileStationHome.js ShopFooter also has info page links but fetches from backend footer settings.

backend_apis: ✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/delivery returns 200 with valid page data (title: Delivery Information, 4 sections)
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/returns returns 200 with valid page data (title: Returns & Refunds)
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/faq returns 200 with valid page data (title: Frequently Asked Questions, has bold markdown)
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/privacy returns 200 with valid page data (title: Privacy Policy)
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/terms returns 200 with valid page data (title: Terms & Conditions)
✓ Delivery page has cards section with 4+ cards with icons
✓ Delivery page has table section with 5+ delivery rate rows
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages returns list of all pages
frontend_ui: ✓ /shop/info/delivery renders with 'Delivery Information' title and 4 highlight cards
✓ /shop/info/returns renders with 'Returns & Refunds' title, policy content, and 4 step cards
✓ /shop/info/faq renders with 'Frequently Asked Questions' title and bold markdown text (9 bold elements)
✓ /shop/info/privacy renders with 'Privacy Policy' title and multiple sections
✓ /shop/info/terms renders with 'Terms & Conditions' title and multiple sections
✓ Footer in ShopLayout has Customer Service section with all 6 required links
✓ Footer link 'Delivery Information' navigates to /shop/info/delivery correctly
✓ Footer link 'Privacy Policy' navigates to /shop/info/privacy correctly
✓ All footer links present: Delivery Information, Returns & Refunds, FAQs, Track Order, Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions
